initiatives.name: With Love San Marcos
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in San Marcos. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care and support.

initiatives.name: Community Centered & Squared
initiatives.description: A community-driven initiative focused on mutual aid and collective support in San Marcos. They facilitate resource distribution, community empowerment, and solidarity networks while creating spaces for community-centered organizing and collective care.

initiatives.name: HYS Free Fridges
initiatives.description: A mutual aid project providing free food access through community fridges in San Marcos. They coordinate food distribution, fridge maintenance, and solidarity networks while building power through food justice initiatives and creating accessible spaces for community nourishment.

initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market San Marcos
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in San Marcos. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.
